key_list: ir importance for survival in a new environment^

text: a member of a space crew originally scheduled to rendezvous with another ship on the lighted surface of the moon
ship was forced to land at a spot some 200 miles (about 321 km) from the rendezvous point.

Box of matches
	Food concentrate
	50 feet of nylon rope
	Parachute silk (降落伞布) 
	Portable heating unit
	Two .45 caliber pistols (.45口径手枪)
	One case of dehydrated milk (一箱脱水牛奶)
	Two 100 lb. tanks of oxygen (2个100磅氧气瓶)
	Stellar map
	Self-inflating life raft
	Magnetic compass
	20 liters of water
	Signal flares
	First aid kit, including injection needle
	Solar-powered FM receiver-transmitter

Imagine that you are a member of a space crew originally scheduled to rendezvous with another ship on the lighted surface of the moon. But ship was forced to land at a spot some 200 miles from the meeting point. I need to rank 15 items based on their importance for survival in a new environment. Items:
Box of matches
Food concentrate
50 feet of nylon rope
Parachute silk (降落伞布)
Portable heating unit
Two .45 caliber pistols (.45口径手枪)
One case of dehydrated milk (一箱脱水牛奶)
Two 100 lb. tanks of oxygen (2个100磅氧气瓶)
Stellar map
Self-inflating life raft
Magnetic compass
20 liters of water
Signal flares
First aid kit, including injection needle
Solar-powered FM receiver-transmitter
